title: chore: clean up app directory — fix stale data, remove dead apps
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Pruning the app garden
gist.blurb: We did some spring cleaning in the app directory! Dead links have been pruned, URLs fixed, and a new health-check script ensures our garden of 600+ community apps stays fresh and working.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the community app directory by fixing malformed URLs, updating renamed GitHub accounts, and removing dead links, alongside a new automated health-check script.
gist.impact: Users browsing the app directory will experience significantly fewer broken links, with over 95% of listed apps now verified as working.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, pruning dead leaves (representing broken links) from a vibrant code-plant (representing the app directory). The monitor robot helps by holding a watering can.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's apron, gently pruning dead pixelated leaves from a glowing code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. A chunky robot with a monitor head holds a watering can nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's apron, gently pruning dead pixelated leaves from a glowing code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. A chunky robot with a monitor head holds a watering can nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
